description_long: This is a highly stylized adult figure suspended in midair, performing an aerial acrobatic pose using long, ribbon-like fabric. The person is dressed in a fitted, short-sleeved top and shorts, with the word 'OUTSIDERS' visible on the back of the shirt. The figure's legs are bent and wrapped around the fabric, and the arms are extended, gripping the ribbons above the head. The person wears knee-high boots and has a sleek, pulled-back hairstyle. The overall form is dynamic, with the body contorted in a dramatic, athletic posture, suggesting movement and strength.
description: A stylized adult performing an aerial acrobatic pose with fabric ribbons, wearing fitted clothing and knee-high boots.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from a diagonal front angle, highlighting the bent legs and the tension in the arms gripping the fabric.
description_view_1: A side view emphasizes the elongated body, the curve of the back, and the extended arm holding the ribbon.
description_view_2: The back view reveals the word 'OUTSIDERS' on the shirt and shows the figure's grip on the fabric from behind.
description_view_3: Another side view, opposite to view 1, showing the facial profile and the dynamic twist of the torso and legs.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic performance wear with short-sleeved top and shorts
attribute_posture: suspended in an aerial acrobatic pose with limbs wrapped around fabric
attribute_hairstyle: long hair pulled back in a sleek style
